title: digera ciliata
intro: Digera ciliata, also known as Rakta Jasmine or Rakta Chandan, is a plant species within the family Aizoeae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Digera ciliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or powder, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various health conditions.
